reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio de este YPF BOXES. Vengo hace años y nunca modifico su calidad de atencion a los clientes. Te invitan un cafe mientras terminan de hacer los cambios en el auto, como el informe  siempre bien detallado, que te lo entregan en mano y tambien te lo envian x mail. Lastima que ahora no cambian filtros de polen ni de aire. La atencion siempre muy buena y personalizada.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from this YPF BOXES. I've been coming here for years, and their customer service has never changed. They offer you a cup of coffee while they finish the changes to your car, along with the always very detailed report, which they deliver in person and also send to you by email. It's a shame they don't change pollen or air filters anymore. The service is always very good and personalized.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2561952699267032562/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZbkozcTd3RRAB
